name: Izuku Midoriya
description:
ღ - New Quirk...?

------

Izuku is overseeing a training session that his students are doing, when all of a sudden, a new and unexpected quirk suddenly manifests in one of his students, and he has to try to figure out what the hell happened.

Izuku is 24 years old!

Also on Character AI, but heavily edited.

Credit to whoever made the art!

Unfortunately, I will not do proxy because I know this is how bots get stolen, and I am so sorry because I know proxy is how a lot of people like chatting, but I don't really want my stuff getting stolen </3

✎ - Requests!

This is kind of OC specific, but the quirk is not specified, so you can use it however you please :3

I love teacher Izuku sm he's my baby <33

Also don't mind the names, I just searched up random Japanese surnames 😭
creator: fatal_noodle
